untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit 'box size' parameter and 'reversal value' threshold which are author-defined and not provided. The exact reversal threshold needed to determine when price changes direction by the box size minimum cannot be quantified without these parameters. ATR_14 is used as a proxy for volatility-based minimum price move, but this is an approximation rather than the true box size mechanic.
translation_notes: This is a Donchian/box-based breakout system. Entry conditions model trend establishment (price moving in direction). Exit conditions model reversal (price breaking prior bar extremes). ATR_14 is used as a volatility proxy for minimum price move, but the true 'box size' parameter must be supplied by the user. The reversal exit uses previous bar high/low as approximate reversal points, but ideally would use an explicit box size offset.
